3332090.name: No forgiveness to the sinners
3332090.description:
*The game is currently only in alpha so everything is currently only a placeholder *

Start of story summary

After his brother takes his own life Noor finds a note left by his brother that hints at him taking his own life because of the people who ruined his life. The story then follows Noor getting revenge for his brother while working with the "freedom church" helping with their requests and going higher in their ranks to get the information he needs to punish the sinners who caused his brother's end.

Game play summary

you play in an OpenWorld doing missions for the church of freedom and others whom you meet on your travels. 

You can also use skills that you learn from people you beat.
